title: A data repository for the study of Alpha-synuclein aggregates trigger anti-viral immune pathways and RNA editing in human astrocytes
author: Choi, Minee-Liane
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains data associated with the study:  
   "Alpha-synuclein Aggregates Trigger Anti-Viral Immune Pathways and RNA Editing in Human Astrocytes"   
  Published as a  bioRxiv preprint :   DOI: 10.1101/2024.02.26.582055
